statement.informal: cosh(x) + sinh(x) equals exp(x). Adding the average and the half-difference of `exp(x)` and `exp(-x)` recovers `exp(x)` itself — one of the cleanest one-line identities in elementary analysis. (over Complex instead of Real)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem cosh_add_sinh_eq_exp (x : ℝ) :
    Complex.cosh x + Complex.sinh x = Complex.exp x

tactics:
theorem cosh_add_sinh_eq_exp (x : ℝ) :
    Complex.cosh x + Complex.sinh x = Complex.exp x := by
  rw [Complex.cosh_eq, Complex.sinh_eq]; ring

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
